name: git_commit
description: Records changes to the repository. Stages all modified and new files (git add .) and then creates a new commit with the provided message. Ensure files are in the desired state before committing.

project_path.description: The root directory path of the project containing the Git repository.

message.description: The commit message describing the changes.

stage_all_files.description: If true (default), stages all new and modified files (`git add .`) before committing. If false, assumes files have already been staged appropriately by a previous step or tool.

allow_empty.description: If true, allows an empty commit (a commit with no changes). Defaults to false.

hints.description: This tool is destructive as it creates a new commit, modifying the repository's history. It is not idempotent.
